title: pilosella ziziana subsp. pachyphyes
intro: Pilosella ziziana subsp. pachyphyes, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella ziziana, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella ziziana subsp. pachyphyes include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its ability to support immune function. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
